productDisplayName: Reebok Men's Premier Ultra Form Red Shoe
description: shoes THAT MOULD TO YOUR FEETOne run in the reebok Premier Ultra 8 is enough to tell you why you need to own one. Replete with U-form technology and a KineticFit system, running in the reebok Premier Ultra 8 is like running on clouds. Designed as an all-rounder, this lightweight, durable shoe suits runners of all types. So leave your cares behind on whether you are an underpronator or overpronator and go grab for yourself this absolute delight for your feet.Customize them yourselfCrafted in a fantastic design, the Reebok Premier Ultra 8 comes with U-form technology that allows you to make the shoe mould to the unique structure of your feet, giving you that premium comfort for maximum performance. To activate the U-form technology, heat the shoe in the oven for three minutes at 200 (degrees) F. Take it out and wear it on for eight minutes, lacing it up nice and tight and you're all set to rule the roost with this perfectly constructed heel.To add to this absolute in comfort is the KineticFit system of the Reebok Premier Ultra 8, which accommodates changes in the size and shape of the runner's feet as an when they move. When you run, the foot can change half a size from impact to toe-off, and it's extremely important that the shoe be able to accommodate such ergonomic changes. The Reebok Premier Ultra 8 fulfills this necessity with utmost ease as it is engineered with stretchable panels that are placed in key areas of the shoe, allowing the shoe to respond naturally to the feet's movement.Slower heel for greater forceAdded to the comfort, moulding heel Fit is the DMX Shear heel to slow down and distribute stress, cushioning the feet during heelstrike. This allows the feet to move forward in comfort, slowing down the heel and enabling the force to distribute both horizontally and vertically, creating less stress.Engineered with a meshed upper to provide ample breathability, the Reebok Premier Ultra 8 also has synthetic overlays on the upper region of the shoe to add that extra support and stability, locking down the foot in place. The synthetic lace-up system adds on to provide a snug fit, while the removable ortholite footbed ensures your feet are well cushioned at the right places and protected from shock.To ensure ample underfoot cushioning that absorbs shock and enhances energy return propelling you forward with ease, the flexible outsole of the Reebok Premier Ultra 8 is constructed using DMX Ride+ and DMX Ride underfoot foam cushioning. So what are you waiting for? Go ahead and pick your pair now. Upper Mesh uppers with synthetic overlays provide breath ability Lace-ups for snug fit Cushioned collar, tongue and footbed for extra comfort Mesh tongue for greater breath ability SmoothFit upper for increased comfort and reduction of seam related irritation Kinetic Fit System provides enhanced support and flexibility in critical areas of the foot Play Dry lining on the insole for moisture management U-Form heel counter keeps the foot securely locked in Midsole IMEVA midsole delivers cushioned support Outsole DMX Ride+ provides enhanced energy return cushioning in the forefoot DMX Shear vertical panels for lasting comfort DMX Shear vertical and horizontal heel cushioning helps to minimize stress on impact DMPRTek rubber outsole offers lightweight cushioning and long-lasting wear Convenient Transition Bridge plate for added support Rubber outsole with multi-directional pattern for greater grip Wash careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
